results.rendered_html:
vaideśika a. (kī f.) [videśa-ṭhañ] Belonging to another country, foreign, exotic.
— kaḥ A stranger, foreigner; vaideśikosmīti pṛcchāmi kaḥ punarasau jāmātā  U. 1.
